description: Bull: 40% SPY + 60% momentum-weighted sectors. Bear: 100% defensive sectors (risk-parity weighted). Always invested, never cash. Vol-targeted to 10%.

how_it_works.regime_detection: Dual regime: SPY above 50-day SMA AND 55%+ sectors above own SMA50
how_it_works.bull_allocation: 40% SPY + 60% in momentum-weighted sectors (risk-parity among sectors with positive composite momentum)
how_it_works.bear_allocation: 100% defensive sectors (XLU, XLP, XLV) weighted by inverse volatility
how_it_works.vol_targeting: Position scaled to target 10% annualized portfolio vol
how_it_works.rebalancing: Monthly sector weights, daily regime check
